home.title: Reticulum-Go
home.subtitle: The resilient, sovereign networking stack for everyone. Now implemented in Go for high performance and portability.

encrypted.title: Encrypted by Default
encrypted.description: Everything in Reticulum is encrypted with strong, modern primitives. No unencrypted traffic ever leaves your device.

resilient.title: Resilient & Sovereign
resilient.description: No central authorities, no servers to shut down. Build your own infrastructure over any medium—radio, fiber, or the internet.

go.title: Go Implementation
go.description: Built with Go for maximum performance, safety, and cross-platform compatibility. Run it anywhere from tiny SBCs to cloud servers.

wasm_promo.title: Try Reticulum-Go in your Browser
wasm_promo.description: Experience the power of Reticulum directly in your browser. Our WASM build allows you to interact with the network without installing anything.
